case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. JONATHAN C WU

Alisa Kim, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Jonathan Wu, defendant also present in court. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
